subcodes.first_line: My true friends, Jinab-i-Amin perfumed his letter with the mention of you and the friends of Dawlatabad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستان حقیقی من جناب امین نامه خویش را بذکر شما مشکین نمود و یاران دولت آباد
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
